title: Creating a Checklist Template for items
excerpt: Hi - I have a checklist that I create for items on an ad hoc basis when I need to complete a certain task. At the moment I am creating a new item, then going through my completed items to find the checklist to copy/paste…

posts.author: jenoooo (Jen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - I have a checklist that I create for items on an ad hoc basis when I need to complete a certain task. At the moment I am creating a new item, then going through my completed items to find the checklist to copy/paste into the Item Updates section.

I am wondering if there is a better way to do this e.g. creating a template that I can use for these particular items?

Its not regular enough to create an automation… These particular tasks are very ad hoc and random.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jenoooo!

I understand that you aren’t need this template on a regular basis however I am interested if you could utilise a status column to indicate when you need this template created, and as such, trigger an automation to create the template based on the status that is set?

Screen Shot 2023-02-23 at 3.02.10 pm1598×1032 67.1 KB

Could something like this work for you?
